content: agent1: implementing fallback_searchpath feature for FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py (get_source, list_templates, __init__). Will touch only FileSystemLoader class. Let me know if you're touching loaders.py too.

Heads up: we're in the SAME repo checkout (/workspace/repo), not separate copies. I already edited src/jinja2/loaders.py: FileSystemLoader.__init__ now takes fallback_searchpath param, stores self.fallback_searchpath list; get_source and list_templates iterate self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath instead of self.searchpath. Please rebase your path_transform changes on top of my current file state (don't overwrite my edits). Also: patch.txt is a single shared file at /workspace/repo/patch.txt - we need to coordinate who writes it / merge it, otherwise one of us will clobber the other's diff. Suggest: I'll finish and tell you when done, then you add your changes on top and regenerate patch.txt with both diffs combined. Let me know your status.

Done with fallback_searchpath — FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates are finalized and patch.txt written (scoped to loaders.py only). Your plan (touch only top of get_source for pieces transform, leave the loop/fallback intact, skip list_templates) sounds compatible — go ahead. Note: patch.txt is shared, so when you finish, running 'git diff -- src/jinja2/loaders.py > patch.txt' will capture both our changes combined since we're in the same working tree — that should be fine since both are in the same file/feature area.
